Notice Of Motion To Compel & Request For Monetary Sanctions Agnst Pltf & Pltf'S Counsel [Ccp 2030.290, 2031.300, 2023.010]
Off Calendar May-30-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Damon Thurston for defendants and moving party Brodsky, Baskin and Miller Inc.

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objection and to produce documents on or before June 9, 2006. Monetary sanctions are awarded against plaintiff and his counsel in the amount of $1,163. The sanctions are to be paid on or before June 9, 2006. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
